call_deputy.name: Call Deputy
call_deputy.description: Deputy attacks — 30 dmg OR hits you for 15.

stall.name: Stall
stall.description: Recover 15 HP. Enemy gets a free hit.

critique.name: Critique
critique.description: Reduces enemy attack by 50% for 2 turns.

optimise.name: Optimise
optimise.description: Copies enemy's last move damage against them.

go_viral.name: Go Viral
go_viral.description: Deals 25 damage and stuns enemy for 1 turn.

scene.name: Scene
scene.description: Deal 20 dmg. Deputy redirected this turn.

detox.name: Detox
detox.description: Heal 25 HP and cleanse enemy damage debuff.

disrupt.name: Disrupt
disrupt.description: Deal 15 dmg and shuffle enemy's next move.
